batch.name: Mingli five elements deep library v1

meta.purpose: Third production batch for the 1000-image Mingli/Yixue education library. It expands the Five Elements into reusable educational, report, tool and share assets.

assets.title: 金元素秩序边界图
assets.description: 说明金在五行中代表收敛、规则、边界、裁剪和秩序化，不是单一性格标签。
assets.subject: Metal element as order, boundary, pruning, discipline and structure in the Five Elements system.
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand Metal beyond a personality label?
mustShow: central refined metal compass and pruning blade metaphor, not weapons
five readable concept cards around the center
autumn, west, white-gold and ink line cues
arrows showing how order reduces waste
compact brand signature
assets.layout: single-element editorial atlas with central symbolic object, five modular cards, seasonal direction layer and report-reading hint strip
assets.altText: 金元素秩序边界图说明收敛规则边界判断裁剪

assets.title: 木元素生长规划图
assets.description: 说明木在五行中代表生发、伸展、规划、方向感和持续生长。
assets.subject: Wood element as growth, planning, stretching, direction and continuity.
assets.userQuestion: Why is Wood about growth direction instead of a fixed temperament?
mustShow: central growing tree root-to-branch system
planning grid and directional arrows integrated with roots
spring, east and green-jade cues
five concept cards that are readable and not dense
compact brand signature
assets.layout: organic growth map with roots, branch paths, planning cards, spring light and modern reasoning grid
assets.altText: 木元素生长规划图说明生发生长伸展计划方向持续

assets.title: 水元素流动恢复图
assets.description: 说明水在五行中代表流动、信息、适应、储备和恢复力。
assets.subject: Water element as flow, information, adaptation, reserve and recovery.
assets.userQuestion: How can users read Water as recovery and flow rather than mystery?
mustShow: central layered water course with reservoir and branching streams
winter, north and deep ink-blue cues within brand palette
cards for information flow, adaptation and recovery
arrows showing reserve to action path
compact brand signature
assets.layout: flow-system diagram with reservoir, river channels, recovery station cards and calm winter atmosphere
assets.altText: 水元素流动恢复图说明流动信息适应储备恢复

assets.title: 火元素表达显化图
assets.description: 说明火在五行中代表显化、热度、表达、连接和注意力。
assets.subject: Fire element as visibility, expression, warmth, connection and attention.
assets.userQuestion: How should Fire be understood as expression without turning into hype?
mustShow: central controlled flame lantern and communication beam, not wildfire
summer, south and cinnabar light cues
visibility funnel from inner signal to public expression
cards for expression, attention and connection
compact brand signature
assets.layout: lantern-stage infographic with controlled light, expression pathway, communication cards and warm but restrained atmosphere
assets.altText: 火元素表达显化图说明显化表达热度连接注意力

assets.title: 土元素承载稳定图
assets.description: 说明土在五行中代表承载、稳定、转化、边界之间的缓冲和长期支持。
assets.subject: Earth element as carrying capacity, stability, transformation, buffering and long-term support.
assets.userQuestion: Why is Earth about carrying capacity rather than being passive?
mustShow: central terraced earth platform supporting five paths
late-summer center and muted ochre-gold cues
load-bearing structure showing capacity and buffering
cards for support, transformation and stability
compact brand signature
assets.layout: load-bearing platform diagram with terraces, capacity scale, buffer arrows and support cards
assets.altText: 土元素承载稳定图说明承载稳定缓冲转化支持

assets.title: 木生火路径图
assets.description: 说明木生火是准备、积累、方向感转化为表达与显化的过程。
assets.subject: Wood generating Fire as preparation and direction becoming expression and visibility.
assets.userQuestion: What does Wood generating Fire mean in a practical modern reading?
mustShow: left wood growth modules feeding a controlled lantern or hearth
clear left-to-right resource arrow
five readable stage cards
small five-element context wheel in corner
compact brand signature
assets.layout: process-path infographic with wood preparation area, transformation gate, fire expression area and stage cards
assets.altText: 木生火路径图说明准备积累方向转化为表达显化

assets.title: 火生土路径图
assets.description: 说明火生土是表达、热度和行动沉淀为成果、信任与承载。
assets.subject: Fire generating Earth as expression and action settling into results, trust and capacity.
assets.userQuestion: How does visibility turn into stable support?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 火生土：热度沉淀为承载
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 火生土：熱度沉澱為承載
mustShow: controlled firelight settling into terraced earth foundation
downward transformation arrows from visibility to support
stage cards for expression, sediment, capacity and trust
subtle product-report card motif
compact brand signature
assets.layout: vertical sedimentation diagram from warm light above to stable earth platform below with clear stage cards
assets.altText: 火生土路径图说明表达热度沉淀为成果信任承载

assets.title: 土生金路径图
assets.description: 说明土生金是承载、积累和沉淀中生出规则、选择与可用资源。
assets.subject: Earth generating Metal as accumulation and support producing order, choice and usable resources.
assets.userQuestion: How does stable carrying capacity produce order and value?
mustShow: earth layers revealing refined metal order lines
screening and crystallization metaphor
cards for accumulation, selection, rule and resource
muted gold linework, no treasure fantasy
compact brand signature
assets.layout: cross-section earth-to-metal diagram with layered terrain, refining gate, rule cards and organized output grid
assets.altText: 土生金路径图说明承载积累筛选生成规则资源

assets.title: 金生水路径图
assets.description: 说明金生水是规则、边界和整理能力带来流动、信息与恢复空间。
assets.subject: Metal generating Water as order and boundary creating flow, information and recovery room.
assets.userQuestion: How can structure create better flow instead of blocking it?
mustShow: precise metal channels guiding clean water flow
organized gate and reservoir metaphor
cards for boundary, channel, flow and recovery
cool jade-teal water layer within parchment palette
compact brand signature
assets.layout: channel-system infographic with metal frame, water route, recovery basin and stage labels
assets.altText: 金生水路径图说明边界整理通道带来流动恢复

assets.title: 水生木路径图
assets.description: 说明水生木是信息、储备和恢复力滋养方向、计划与持续生长。
assets.subject: Water generating Wood as information, reserve and recovery nourishing growth, plan and direction.
assets.userQuestion: How does recovery become new growth?
mustShow: reservoir and streams nourishing roots and new branches
resource flow arrows from water to wood
cards for reserve, recovery, sprout and direction
calm new-cycle atmosphere
compact brand signature
assets.layout: renewal-cycle infographic with water reservoir, root network, sprouting path and stage cards
assets.altText: 水生木路径图说明储备恢复滋养发芽方向

assets.title: 木克土调节图
assets.description: 说明木克土不是坏事，而是方向和规划对承载、停滞和边界的调节。
assets.subject: Wood controlling Earth as planning and direction regulating carrying capacity and stagnation.
assets.userQuestion: How can controlling relationships be useful regulation instead of bad luck?
mustShow: root systems organizing a heavy earth platform
not destruction, show channels and pruning of stagnation
control arrow clearly marked as regulation
five readable concept cards
compact brand signature
assets.layout: regulation diagram with roots opening channels through earth, balanced before-after panels and control cards
assets.altText: 木克土调节图说明方向规划疏通承载停滞

assets.title: 土克水调节图
assets.description: 说明土克水是承载、边界和容器对流动、信息与情绪扩散的调节。
assets.subject: Earth controlling Water as container, boundary and carrying capacity regulating flow.
assets.userQuestion: When does flow need a container?
mustShow: earthen channels and basin shaping water flow
calm containment, not flood panic
before-after flow map showing useful boundary
cards for container, boundary, flow and expansion
compact brand signature
assets.layout: water containment board with basin, channels, regulated flow arrows and boundary cards
assets.altText: 土克水调节图说明容器边界承载调节流动扩散

assets.title: 水克火调节图
assets.description: 说明水克火是冷却、复盘和储备对热度、表达与冲动的调节。
assets.subject: Water controlling Fire as cooling, review and reserve regulating heat and impulsive expression.
assets.userQuestion: Why does high heat need review and reserve?
mustShow: controlled cooling channel around a lantern flame
review loop and pause marker, not extinguishing hope
cards for cooling, review, reserve and expression
balanced water-fire palette
compact brand signature
assets.layout: cooling-loop infographic with lantern, water circuit, review station cards and balance gauge
assets.altText: 水克火调节图说明冷却复盘储备调节热度表达

assets.title: 火克金调节图
assets.description: 说明火克金是热度、表达和实践对规则、边界与僵化结构的调节。
assets.subject: Fire controlling Metal as expression and practice softening rigid rules and refining structure.
assets.userQuestion: How can expression refine rules without destroying them?
mustShow: controlled forge refining a metal compass or rule grid
not violent melting; show precise adjustment
cards for practice, heat, adjustment, rule and rigidity
before-after refined order panel
compact brand signature
assets.layout: refining workshop infographic with controlled fire, metal rule grid, adjustment arrows and before-after cards
assets.altText: 火克金调节图说明实践热度调整规则僵化

assets.title: 金克木调节图
assets.description: 说明金克木是规则、裁剪和边界对过度扩张、分散和无序生长的调节。
assets.subject: Metal controlling Wood as pruning, rules and boundaries regulating excessive expansion.
assets.userQuestion: Why does growth need pruning and boundaries?
mustShow: garden pruning metaphor with refined metal tool and healthy branches
focus paths after pruning, not cutting down life
cards for pruning, boundary, focus, growth and expansion
safe educational visual tone
compact brand signature
assets.layout: garden-regulation infographic with pruning path, focused branches, before-after growth map and concept cards
assets.altText: 金克木调节图说明裁剪边界聚焦保护生长扩张

assets.title: 木过旺与再平衡
assets.description: 说明木过旺可表现为扩张过快、计划过多、方向分散，需要边界、沉淀和复盘。
assets.subject: Wood excess as too much expansion and planning, rebalanced by boundary, sedimentation and review.
assets.userQuestion: How should a report explain Wood excess without labeling the user?
mustShow: overgrown branch network being organized into focused paths
balance dashboard with Wood as high but not scary
three balancing levers: Metal boundary, Earth sediment, Water review
report-reading card: tendency not destiny
compact brand signature
assets.layout: report-dashboard infographic with overgrown wood map, balancing levers, tendency-not-destiny seal and clear cards
assets.altText: 木过旺再平衡图说明扩张分散需要边界沉淀复盘

assets.title: 火过旺与再平衡
assets.description: 说明火过旺可表现为热度过高、表达过强、消耗过快，需要冷却、承载和规则。
assets.subject: Fire excess as high heat, strong expression and fast depletion, rebalanced by cooling, capacity and rules.
assets.userQuestion: How should high Fire be explained safely as a rhythm issue?
mustShow: bright but controlled flame dashboard with cooling loop
balance levers: Water cooling, Earth capacity, Metal rules
energy gauge without fear language
report-reading card: rhythm not punishment
compact brand signature
assets.layout: rhythm-dashboard infographic with controlled fire center, cooling circuit, support platform and rule grid cards
assets.altText: 火过旺再平衡图说明热度消耗需要冷却承载规则

assets.title: 土过旺与再平衡
assets.description: 说明土过旺可表现为承载过重、推进变慢、系统黏滞，需要疏通、流动和裁剪。
assets.subject: Earth excess as heavy carrying load and sticky systems, rebalanced by channeling, flow and pruning.
assets.userQuestion: How can users understand too much Earth as load management?
mustShow: heavy earth platform with channels opening through it
balance levers: Wood channeling, Water flow, Metal pruning
load gauge and capacity map
report-reading card: load not fate
compact brand signature
assets.layout: capacity-management dashboard with heavy platform, opening channels, flow paths and pruning cards
assets.altText: 土过旺再平衡图说明承载黏滞需要疏通流动裁剪

assets.title: 金过旺与再平衡
assets.description: 说明金过旺可表现为规则过密、边界过硬、裁剪过度，需要温度、流动和生长空间。
assets.subject: Metal excess as overly dense rules and hard boundaries, rebalanced by warmth, flow and growth room.
assets.userQuestion: How should strict structure be softened without losing order?
mustShow: dense metal grid softened by warm light and flowing channels
balance levers: Fire warmth, Water flow, Wood growth
boundary gauge showing useful versus excessive
report-reading card: structure not judgment
compact brand signature
assets.layout: rule-density dashboard with metal grid, warming lantern, water channels, growth gaps and balance cards
assets.altText: 金过旺再平衡图说明规则边界需要温度流动生长

assets.title: 水过旺与再平衡
assets.description: 说明水过旺可表现为流动过散、信息过多、行动延迟，需要承载、显化和边界。
assets.subject: Water excess as too much flow and information, rebalanced by capacity, visibility and boundary.
assets.userQuestion: How can abundant flow become action instead of delay?
mustShow: many water streams converging into clear landing basins
balance levers: Earth landing point, Fire visibility, Metal boundary
information-overflow gauge without anxiety tone
report-reading card: flow needs form
compact brand signature
assets.layout: flow-to-action dashboard with streams, basins, visibility beacon, boundary gates and balance cards
assets.altText: 水过旺再平衡图说明流动信息需要落点显化边界

assets.title: 五行与事业领域图
assets.description: 说明五行在事业分析中可以作为工作方式、行业气质和协作节奏的参考，不是职业宿命。
assets.subject: Five Elements applied to career fields as work modes and collaboration rhythms, not career destiny.
assets.userQuestion: How can Five Elements help users think about career without deterministic labels?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 五行看事业：不是职业宿命
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 五行看事業：不是職業宿命
mustShow: five work-mode districts rather than fixed job labels
central career decision compass connected to structure, timing, environment and action
cards for collaboration rhythm and industry temperament
boundary seal: reference not destiny
compact brand signature
assets.layout: career-domain map with five districts, central compass, work-mode cards, collaboration lines and clear boundary seal
assets.altText: 五行与事业领域图说明创造表达承载规则流动不是职业宿命

assets.title: 五行与关系节奏图
assets.description: 说明五行在关系中可帮助理解推进、表达、承载、边界和恢复节奏，不替代现实沟通。
assets.subject: Five Elements in relationship rhythm as pace, expression, support, boundary and recovery.
assets.userQuestion: How can Five Elements explain relationship rhythm without making deterministic claims?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 五行看关系：看节奏，不贴标签
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 五行看關係：看節奏，不貼標籤
mustShow: abstract relationship bridge with two non-identifiable silhouettes or symbolic nodes
five rhythm lanes: push, express, support, boundary, recover
communication path and review loop
boundary note: not personality labeling
compact brand signature
assets.layout: relationship-rhythm board with abstract nodes, five lanes, bridge structure, communication cards and review loop
assets.altText: 五行与关系节奏图说明推进表达承载边界恢复不贴标签

assets.title: 五行与城市环境图
assets.description: 说明城市环境可从行业密度、节奏、气候、动线和恢复空间理解五行落地。
assets.subject: Five Elements applied to city environment through industry density, rhythm, climate, movement and recovery space.
assets.userQuestion: Why can the same structure feel different in different cities?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 同一结构，落地城市不同
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 同一結構，落地城市不同
mustShow: stylized city map divided into five environmental layers
industry density, rhythm, climate, movement path and recovery zone
central user structure marker adapting to environment
no city ranking or relocation guarantee
compact brand signature
assets.layout: modern city-environment atlas with five layers, movement lines, recovery pockets, industry clusters and structure marker
assets.altText: 五行与城市环境图说明行业节奏气候动线恢复影响结构落地

assets.title: 五行恢复方式图
assets.description: 说明五行可转译为不同恢复方式：疏展、降温、承载、整理和回流。
assets.subject: Five Elements as recovery modes: stretching, cooling, grounding, organizing and returning flow.
assets.userQuestion: How can users translate Five Elements into non-medical recovery rhythms?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 五行恢复：找到适合的回路
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 五行恢復：找到適合的迴路
mustShow: five calm recovery stations with abstract non-medical actions
loop from depletion to restoration to next action
clear boundary note: rhythm reference, not medical advice
soft product-report style cards
compact brand signature
assets.layout: recovery-loop map with five stations, calm movement arrows, non-medical boundary seal and next-action cards
assets.altText: 五行恢复方式图说明疏展降温承载整理回流不是医疗建议

assets.title: 五行报告阅读顺序图
assets.description: 说明用户在报告中应按结构、强弱、生克、用力方向和行动建议阅读五行。
assets.subject: How to read Five Elements in a report through structure, strength, relationships, direction and action.
assets.userQuestion: What should users look at first when they see Five Elements in their report?
assets.ctaCopySimplified: 先读重点，再看深入报告
assets.ctaCopyTraditional: 先讀重點，再看深入報告
mustShow: report cockpit screen with five-step reading path
first-report card leading to deep report layers
avoid dense textual report screenshot; use cards and paths
decision path: structure to timing to action
compact brand signature
assets.layout: product cockpit infographic with central report UI, five-step reading path, deep-report doorway and next-action cards
assets.altText: 五行报告阅读顺序图说明结构强弱生克方向行动

assets.title: 五行不是性格标签
assets.description: 适合传播的五行边界图，强调五行是关系、节奏和系统调节，不是给人贴标签。
assets.subject: A shareable education poster explaining that Five Elements are relationships and rhythms, not personality labels.
assets.userQuestion: What is the simplest safe message users can share about Five Elements?
mustShow: bold central headline suitable for sharing
five element symbols arranged as a balanced system
three visual contrasts: label versus relationship, fixed fate versus rhythm, fear versus review
shareable poster composition with rich educational details
compact brand signature
assets.layout: shareable editorial poster with bold headline, balanced five-element system, contrast cards and bottom CTA strip
assets.altText: 五行不是性格标签传播图说明关系节奏调节边界复盘

assets.title: 五行生克传播卡
assets.description: 用适合收藏和分享的方式说明五行相生相克都是系统调节。
assets.subject: A 4:5 social share card explaining Five Elements generating and controlling as system regulation.
assets.userQuestion: How can the generating and controlling cycles be shared in one clear image?
mustShow: vertical poster with top headline and central five-element dual-ring diagram
inner generating arrows and outer controlling arrows
five large short labels only, no dense text
bottom CTA strip and compact brand signature
safe wording: regulation, not good or bad
assets.layout: 4:5 vertical social poster with dual-ring five-element diagram, bold headline, large labels and bottom CTA strip
assets.altText: 五行生克传播卡说明相生相克制化平衡行动

assets.title: 五行日常行动卡
assets.description: 把五行转译成日常行动：规划、表达、整理、恢复和承载。
assets.subject: A vertical social card translating Five Elements into everyday action modes.
assets.userQuestion: How can users use Five Elements as a daily action checklist?
mustShow: vertical daily action board with five large action stations
morning-to-night rhythm arc
no guarantee of outcome, only action reference
bottom CTA strip and compact brand signature
rich lifestyle-symbolic details without real people
assets.layout: 4:5 vertical daily-action poster with five stations, rhythm arc, strong headline, large labels and compact brand footer
assets.altText: 五行日常行动卡说明规划表达承载整理恢复

assets.title: 五行现代翻译传播卡
assets.description: 面向新用户的传播图，把金木水火土翻译为现代判断语言。
assets.subject: A beginner social card translating metal wood water fire earth into modern judgment language.
assets.userQuestion: How can beginners quickly understand the modern translation of Five Elements?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 金木水火土，怎么翻译成现代判断？
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 金木水火土，怎麼翻譯成現代判斷？
mustShow: five stacked translation cards with large labels
traditional symbol on left, modern judgment meaning on right
vertical share-friendly composition
CTA strip leading to Life Kline analysis
compact brand signature
assets.layout: 4:5 vertical translation poster with five stacked cards, bold headline, traditional-to-modern bridge and bottom CTA
assets.altText: 五行现代翻译传播卡说明秩序生长流动表达承载

assets.title: 五行平衡提问卡
assets.description: 传播型提问图，引导用户从五行平衡进入个人结构测算。
assets.subject: A share card that invites users to ask which Five Elements rhythm needs balance in their current phase.
assets.userQuestion: What question can guide a user from Five Elements curiosity into a structured personal report?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 你现在最需要平衡哪一行？
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 你現在最需要平衡哪一行？
assets.ctaCopySimplified: 测算后看结构，不凭感觉猜
assets.ctaCopyTraditional: 測算後看結構，不憑感覺猜
mustShow: vertical social question poster with five element choice orbits
clear CTA that encourages structured analysis rather than guessing
balanced visual without implying one element is best
large readable Chinese headline
compact brand signature
assets.layout: 4:5 vertical interactive-feeling poster with five element orbits, bold question headline, structured-analysis CTA and compact brand footer
assets.altText: 五行平衡提问卡引导用户测算后看结构不凭感觉猜
